title: Implement role selection — write profiles.role
description: Wire the Continue button on /onboarding/role to write the selected role to profiles and navigate to the correct onboarding flow.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking Continue calls supabase.from('profiles').update({ role: selectedRole }).eq('id', userId)
On success: role 'tenant' navigates to /onboarding/tenant-step-1, role 'landlord' navigates to /onboarding/landlord
On error: shows inline error message
Continue button shows loading state during the update

steps.details: document.getElementById('continue-btn').addEventListener('click', async () => { continueBtn.disabled = true; continueBtn.textContent = 'Saving…'; const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession(); const { error } = await supabase.from('profiles').update({ role: selectedRole }).eq('id', session.user.id); if (error) { showError(error.message); continueBtn.disabled = false; continueBtn.textContent = 'Continue'; return; } window.location.href = selectedRole === 'landlord' ? '/onboarding/landlord' : '/onboarding/tenant-step-1'; });
